description: Create a workflow automation rule for the Potentials module in Vtiger CRM named 'Auto-Update Next Step on Closed Won'. The workflow should trigger every time a record is saved when the 'Sales Stage' is 'Closed Won'. Add an 'Update Fields' action titled 'Set Next Step to Generate Invoice' that sets the 'Next Step' field to 'Generate Invoice'. Ensure the workflow is saved and active.

metadata.expected_summary: Auto-Update Next Step on Closed Won
